required_skills: Supply Chain Planning and Demand Forecasting
Supply Chain Performance Measurement and KPI Analysis
Advanced Microsoft Excel and Spreadsheet Modeling
preferred_skills: Risk Management and Supply Chain Resilience
Sustainability and Green Supply Chain Practices
responsibilities: Analyze demand patterns, inventory levels, and replenishment cycles to improve forecast accuracy and maintain optimal stock availability across distribution networks.
Develop supply chain performance dashboards using business intelligence tools to monitor service levels, inventory turnover, and operational efficiency metrics.
Collaborate with procurement, logistics, and production teams to align supply plans with business objectives and customer demand forecasts.
Build statistical forecasting models using historical sales data to improve planning accuracy and reduce inventory carrying costs.
Conduct root cause analysis on supply disruptions, stockouts, and excess inventory situations to recommend corrective operational actions.
Evaluate supplier and distribution performance using key performance indicators and present actionable insights to cross-functional stakeholders.
Optimize inventory policies, safety stock parameters, and replenishment strategies to balance service levels and working capital objectives.
Prepare scenario-based analyses to assess supply chain risks, capacity constraints, and demand fluctuations affecting operational performance.
